author: Clement Tham
name: 11L 16h Local 4060 Ti LeakyTTT
blurb: Unlimited compute local run on a single RTX 4060 Ti of the 11-layer LeakyReLU^2 + Parallel Muon + XSA4 + Partial RoPE + LN scale + EMA + legal TTT stack. Timed training stopped at 7,998 steps after 16 hours; final legal score-first TTT evaluation reached 1.15377788 val_bpb under the 16,000,000-byte artifact cap.
notes: Review and edit locally before PR. Sliding-window int6 eval reached 1.15520389 val_bpb; final legal_ttt_exact reached 1.15377788.
